VAL-PROV-002.title: ProviderTransport::connect establishes connection and returns connected state
VAL-PROV-002.details: Both tests passed. mock_provider_connect_disconnect verified connect/disconnect lifecycle on CodexProvider. mobile_client_connect_with_provider_succeeds verified MobileClient connects via provider-backed path with server ID 'provider-test'. Command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- mock_provider_connect mobile_client_connect_with_provider_succeeds → 2 passed, 0 failed

steps.action: Run cargo test with filters: mock_provider_connect mobile_client_connect_with_provider_succeeds

steps.observed: ok — logged 'MobileClient: connected provider-backed server provider-test'

VAL-PROV-003.title: ProviderTransport::connect failure returns TransportError, no panic
VAL-PROV-003.details: All connect failure tests passed. connect_failure_returns_error_no_panic_reusable verified invalid URL returns Err without panic. connect_failure_on_never_connected_provider verified operations on never-connected provider return proper error. reconnect_failure_then_success verified reconnect failure path. Command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- connect_failure → 3 passed, 0 failed

steps.action: Run cargo test with filter: connect_failure

VAL-PROV-004.title: ProviderTransport::disconnect cleanly tears down resources
VAL-PROV-004.details: All disconnect tests passed. disconnect_is_idempotent verified double-disconnect causes no panic. Three post_disconnect_* tests verified that request, notification, and list_sessions all return Disconnected error after teardown. Command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- disconnect_is_idempotent post_disconnect → 4 passed, 0 failed

steps.action: Run cargo test with filters: disconnect_is_idempotent post_disconnect

steps.expected: ok — no panic on double disconnect

VAL-PROV-005.title: ProviderTransport::stream_events yields normalized ProviderEvents
VAL-PROV-005.evidence: 8 tests passed: provider_event_mapping_completeness, every_provider_event_variant_maps_or_returns_none, provider_event_message_delta_to_ui_event, provider_event_reasoning_delta_to_ui_event, provider_event_command_output_delta_to_ui_event, provider_event_turn_started_to_ui_event, provider_event_turn_completed_to_ui_event, provider_event_disconnected_to_ui_event
VAL-PROV-005.details: All mapping tests passed. provider_event_mapping_completeness exhaustively verified every AppServerEvent variant maps to a ProviderEvent. every_provider_event_variant_maps_or_returns_none verified all ProviderEvent variants are handled. Individual mapping tests verified correct translation for message delta, reasoning delta, command output delta, turn started, turn completed, and disconnected events. Command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- provider_event_mapping_completeness every_provider_event_variant_maps_or_returns_none provider_event_message_delta provider_event_reasoning_delta provider_event_command_output provider_event_turn_started provider_event_turn_completed provider_event_disconnected → 8 passed, 0 failed

VAL-PROV-009.title: ServerSession holds Box<dyn ProviderTransport> without behavior change
VAL-PROV-009.evidence: 5 tests passed: from_provider_creates_connected_session, from_provider_request_through_session, from_provider_notify_succeeds, from_provider_events_forwarded, from_provider_disconnect_transitions_health
VAL-PROV-009.details: All ServerSession trait transport tests passed. from_provider_creates_connected_session verified session creation through trait-based transport. from_provider_request_through_session verified RPC requests work through the trait boundary. from_provider_notify_succeeds verified notifications. from_provider_events_forwarded verified event streaming. from_provider_disconnect_transitions_health verified health state transitions on disconnect. Command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- from_provider → 5 passed, 0 failed

VAL-PROV-015.details: Both tests passed. post_disconnect_list_sessions_returns_disconnected_error verified list_sessions returns Disconnected error after teardown. session_info_record_construction verified correct construction of SessionInfo records used in list_sessions results.
